final_prompt.prompt:
Create a minimalist product shot of a luxury perfume bottle for high-end magazine advertising or e-commerce hero image.

Style/medium: minimalist product photography, architectural precision, luxury editorial aesthetic
Composition: centered framing with generous negative space, eye-level straight-on angle, medium telephoto lens
Subject: high-end perfume bottle with irregular polyhedral faceted glass body, ultra-clear transparency, pale amber liquid inside, matte black metal cap with embossed brand logo relief pattern
Scene/backdrop: pure white marble pedestal, gradient off-white background, clean and restrained environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light from upper left, creating refined refraction spectrum across faceted glass surfaces, cool and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: pale amber as liquid accent, matte black cap as dark anchor, off-white and marble white as neutral base
Materials/textures: crystal-clear faceted glass with light refraction, matte black metal cap with subtle embossed texture, smooth cold marble surface
Avoid: busy backgrounds, warm yellow tones, harsh shadows, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic
